name: Suggestion
about: Suggest a new feature or change.
title: ''
labels: enhancement

type: Feature

---

**Feature request rules (delete this)**
* First check Discord and GitHub for an existing suggestion.
* Do not use AI to 'make your suggestion better'. It just adds fluff and makes it hard to read.
* Don't post walls of text, be concise.
* One suggestion per issue, open multiple if needed.
* Don't suggest new weapons or vehicles unless they actually bring new functionality (a new gun doesn't bring new functionality).

**Suggestion**
Quick and concise description of the addition.

**Pictures**
If applicable, include a picture or two of what you're thinking about.
